news.headline: Peter Magyar: former Fidesz insider who vowed to dismantle Orban system 'brick by brick'
news.summary: A former Orban loyalist, Peter Magyar carried his Tisza party to a crushing win in Sunday's high-stakes elections, ending 16 years of Fidesz rule. The 45-year-old has pledged to crack down on corruption and rebuild Hungary's damaged relationships with the European Union and NATO.
